---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What user problem would this solve? Who hits it, and when?

## Proposed solution

A brief description of the change you have in mind. If it touches the pipeline or the
`index.json` schema, sketch the data flow and note backward-compatibility.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you weighed, and why this one.

## Scope / size

Rough sense of the change (a flag, a new module, a refactor) and whether you'd like to open a
PR for it.

## Additional context

Links to related issues, the roadmap (`docs/superpowers/specs/`), papers, or prior art.
